# ReqRun GitHub Repo

This repository describes ReqRun, a reliability layer for OpenAI-compatible non-streaming chat completion requests.

Best starting points:
- README.md
- docs/dev-quickstart.md
- docs/agent-guide.md
- openapi.yaml
- examples/README.md
- packages/sdk-js/README.md
- SECURITY.md

Canonical public product facts:
- Hosted API: https://api.reqrun.com
- Docs: https://www.reqrun.com/docs
- Quickstart: https://www.reqrun.com/docs/quickstart
- API reference: https://www.reqrun.com/docs/api
- llms.txt: https://www.reqrun.com/llms.txt
- llms-full.txt: https://www.reqrun.com/llms-full.txt

Current integration facts:
- POST /v1/chat/completions
- GET /v1/requests/{id}
- Bearer ReqRun project API key
- Async request ids start with rr_
- wait=true returns fast-path completion when available
- wait=false returns async request state immediately

Runnable standalone examples:
- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-nextjs-route-handler
- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-express-api
- https://github.com/ReqRun/reqrun-example-fastapi-service

Current product boundary:
- reliability layer only
- OpenAI-compatible
- non-streaming only in v1
- no workflow builder
- no analytics suite
- no provider marketplace
